executable.cmd: python3 -m rayfronts.mapping_server --config-name $(var config_name) dataset=$(var dataset) messaging_service=ros messaging_service.topic_prefix=/robot_$(env ROS_DOMAIN_ID)/rayfronts/msg_serv messaging_service.text_query_topic=/robot_$(env ROS_DOMAIN_ID)/rayfronts/msg_serv/new_text_query vis.topic_prefix=/robot_$(env ROS_DOMAIN_ID)/rayfronts querying.text_query_mode=prompts querying.query_file=null querying.compute_prob=True querying.period=$(var query_period)
